summary: Add Rumi Masnavi Book I (Whinfield 1898) entry to manifest + verify acquire.py
description:
Append [[source]] entry to sources/manifest.toml:

id = "masnavi-book-1"
tradition = "sufism"
label = "The Masnavi, Book I (Rumi)"
url = "https://sacred-texts.com/isl/masnavi/msn01.htm"
format = "html"
license = "public_domain"
translator = "E.H. Whinfield"
notes = "Whinfield 1898 — heavily abridged paraphrase. Rumi 13th c. Book I contains the reed-flute prologue (canonical Sufi return_to_source statement)."

OPEN: before settling on Whinfield, verify whether Nicholson's Masnavi Book I (1925) is US-PD and substitute if so. Nicholson is the scholarly standard; Whinfield is a Victorian abridgement. If Nicholson is usable, update the entry's url/translator/notes accordingly.

'sufism' is a new tradition string.
